Exceptional Partner Program
EPP Program v1.0
🇮🇳 India Partner Network

ORN Vacations
Exceptional Partner

Build a high-earning travel business as an Exceptional Partner of ORN Vacations. Your commission split starts at 80/20 and improves to 70/30 as your sales grow — based on your verified Sales Base established at on-boarding.

What is the EPP Program?
🤝
Independent Partnership
You run your own travel business — your premises, your staff, your brand alongside TripFactory’s. We provide the product, platform, and commercial infrastructure. You provide the customer relationships and sales expertise.
💰
Real Commission — Not Token Fees
Revenue split starts at 80/20 (ORN/EPP) based on your verified Sales Base established during due diligence on-boarding. Achieve 1× growth → 75/25. Achieve 2× → 70/30. Paid twice monthly on the 15th and 30th.
🏗️
Full Commercial Infrastructure
TripFactory’s booking platform, contracted hotel rates, MICE capability, visa support, and a named BDM. Everything you need to compete with the largest travel agencies in India from Day 1.
🎓
Trip-Ed Training Program
Mandatory professional development — destination modules, product training, sales skills, compliance. 12 modules per year minimum. Complete induction before your first booking.
💳
Credit Facility Available
Lodge a Security Deposit and access a Credit Limit of 4× that amount. Confirm bookings ahead of full customer payment — close deals faster with a powerful commercial advantage.
📈
Tier Advancement — Earn More
Commission split is tied to sales performance against your verified Sales Base. Opening split is 80/20. Hit 1× your base → 75/25. Hit 2× → 70/30. Every improvement is earned through measurable growth.
Ideal EPP Profile
✓ Who This Program is For
  • Experienced travel agents with an existing customer base
  • Independent travel agencies expanding their product portfolio
  • Corporate travel consultants adding leisure and MICE products
  • Community-connected professionals with strong referral networks
  • Anyone motivated to build a travel business with professional infrastructure
🔑 What TripFactory Provides
  • Named Business Development Manager — your dedicated commercial contact
  • Booking platform, CRM, quotation tools, real-time reporting
  • In-house contracted hotel rates — lower than OTA market rates
  • Monthly co-branded marketing assets, social media templates
  • Trip-Ed professional training program
  • Full after-sales operations support for every confirmed booking
Agreement at a Glance
📅
3-Year Initial Term
Runs for 3 years from the Effective Date. Automatic renewal unless either party gives 90 days’ written notice. Annual review of commission rates and targets.
🏛️
Indian Law · Bangalore Arbitration
Governed by Indian Contract Act 1872, DPDPA 2023, Consumer Protection Act 2019. Single arbitrator mutually agreed. Bangalore seat.
📋
Non-Exclusive Appointment
TripFactory retains the right to appoint other EPP Partners in the same territory and sell directly. No territory lock-in is provided under this model.
Core EPP Obligations
📊 Sales & Reporting
  • Sell Products per TripFactory’s pricing and guidelines
  • Log all leads and bookings in CRM within 24 hours
  • Monthly sales report by 5th of each month
  • 12-month Business Plan within 60 days of Effective Date
  • Quarterly Business Reviews with assigned BDM
  • Meet Minimum Sales Targets for your tier
⚖️ Compliance
  • Hold all required travel agent licences (IATA / TAAI / TAFI)
  • Comply with DPDPA 2023 — full customer data protection
  • GST registration where turnover exceeds ₹20 Lakhs
  • Travel insurance mandatory — advise all Customers
  • All customer payments via TripFactory approved channels only
  • Complete Trip-Ed Induction before processing any booking
Termination Triggers
⚡ Immediate Termination — TripFactory may terminate without notice for:

Fraud or misrepresentation · Payment default or retention of customer funds · Mis-selling · Data protection breach · Repeated Credit Facility Default Events · Criminal conviction · Insolvency · Any act bringing TripFactory into disrepute

📩 90-Day Notice Termination — Either party may exit by giving:

90 days’ written notice at any time. A Termination Fee (equal to remaining monthly platform fees) is payable by the EPP on voluntary early exit during the Initial Term.

Post-Termination Obligations
🚫
Non-Compete — 12 Months
Cannot approach ORN Vacations Customers for competing travel products for 12 months after termination.
👥
Non-Solicitation — 12 Months
Cannot recruit ORN Vacations staff or other EPP Partners for 12 months post-termination.
🗑️
Brand Removal — 7 Days
All ORN Vacations branding must be removed from all digital and physical channels within 7 days of termination.
Additional EPP Terms
🔒 Key Obligations — All EPP Partners

The following obligations are binding on every EPP from the date of signing the EPP Agreement and remain in force for the duration of the Agreement and, where specified, beyond termination.

🔐
System Access & Login Security
System access credentials and login details are issued exclusively to the named EPP and are for their use only. Login credentials must not be shared with any third party — including staff, associates, or sub-agents — under any circumstances. Unauthorised sharing constitutes a material breach of the EPP Agreement and may result in immediate termination.
👥
No Sub-Agents Without Approval
The EPP may not appoint any sub-agents or representatives to act on their behalf or within their territory without obtaining prior written approval from ORN Vacations PTE. Any sub-agent appointment made without such approval is void and constitutes a breach of the EPP Agreement.
🔗
Exclusive to ORN Vacations PTE
The EPP works exclusively for ORN Vacations PTE in the capacity of Exceptional Partner. The EPP may not represent, promote, or operate as an agent for any competing travel business, tour operator, or holiday provider during the term of this Agreement without prior written consent from ORN Vacations PTE.
📋
Full Access to Company Records
Throughout the term of the EPP Agreement, ORN Vacations PTE shall have full access to all company records of the EPP, including financial statements, sales records, customer data, and marketing materials. This access underpins the ongoing due diligence and monitoring obligations of ORN Vacations PTE and the commission review process.
🔒
Data Protection & Confidentiality
All data collected or handled by the EPP in connection with ORN Vacations PTE — including customer data, pricing information, booking records, and proprietary business data — must be fully protected and must not be shared outside of the company or with any third party without the prior written approval of ORN Vacations PTE. All data handling must comply with applicable data protection law.
Territory & Area Rights
📍
Defined Territory
Each EPP is appointed to a defined geographic area at on-boarding. Territory and radius boundaries are documented in Schedule A of the EPP Agreement, taking into account population, sales infrastructure, and market opportunity.
🏁
Market Share Priority
Within your defined radius, ORN Vacations gives your EPP business first opportunity to serve leads and clients — enabling you to build considerable and dominant market share before any further appointments are made in that territory.
👥
No Sub-Agents Without Approval
Territory rights are held exclusively by the named EPP. Sub-agents or representatives may not be appointed within or beyond the defined area without prior written approval from ORN Vacations PTE. Area rights are conditional on active trading and meeting performance thresholds.
⚠ Area Rights Are Conditional — Not Absolute Exclusivity

ORN Vacations commits to giving the EPP first opportunity in their defined territory. This is not a guarantee of exclusivity. ORN Vacations retains the right to sell directly and appoint additional partners where demand cannot be serviced by the existing EPP.

On-Boarding & Commission Structure
Step 1 — On-Boarding Due Diligence

Establishing Your Sales Base

As part of on-boarding, ORN Vacations conducts comprehensive due diligence covering financials, sales analysis, customer base, and marketing capability. Your current verified sales figure becomes the Sales Base — the starting point for your commission structure.

📈 Financial analysis
👥 Customer base review
🔥 Sales performance history
🚀 Marketing capability
Step 2 — Revenue Split (ORN Vacations / EPP)
At Sales Base
80/20
ORN / EPP
Opening split based on your verified Sales Base established during due diligence on-boarding.
● Starting point
NEXT LEVEL
1× Sales Increase
75/25
ORN / EPP
Double your Sales Base — the split improves to 75/25. Example: Base of £1M → achieve £2M.
↑ +5% to EPP share
2× Sales Increase & Above
70/30
ORN / EPP
Achieve 2× or more of your Sales Base — the best split available. Example: Base of £1M → achieve £3M+.
🏆 Maximum EPP reward
📋
Monitoring Throughout the Term
ORN Vacations retains full access to all company records including financials throughout the term. Sales performance is reviewed regularly to determine commission split adjustments.
The Three EPP Tiers
Tier 1
Starter Partner
1–3 years in travel · building client base

Growth Partner
3–5 years · 200–500 pax/yr · scaling

Commission on Gross Profit65%
Onboarding Fee₹40,000 + GST
Monthly Platform Fee₹3,500 + GST
BDM SupportNamed BDM (dedicated)

Advance to Tier 3 at₹3 Crore / year
Tier 3
Senior Partner
5+ years · 500+ pax/yr · high volume
Min Annual Gross Sales₹3 Crore+
Commission on Gross Profit70%
Onboarding Fee₹60,000 + GST
Monthly Platform Fee₹5,000 + GST
BDM SupportNamed Senior BDM
Recommended Min Deposit₹2,50,000
Resulting Credit Limit (4×)₹10,00,000
Fam Trip EligibilityFrom Year 1
Maintain by achieving₹3 Crore+ / year
Commission Payment Models
Model A — Split Commission
50% on deposit · 50% after departure · paid 15th & 30th each month
1
Customer pays deposit → TripFactory receives it → 50% of your total Commission paid on the next 15th or 30th.
2
Customer departs → Remaining 50% paid on the next 15th or 30th after departure date.
3
Statements issued on 14th and 29th each month. All payments by NEFT/RTGS. TDS deducted under Section 194H.
Worked Example
Total Commission on booking₹12,000
Deposit received 1 March₹6,000 → paid 15 March
Customer departs 20 April₹6,000 → paid 30 April
Best suited to

EPPs with strong deposit collection wanting early Commission flow on each booking.

Model B — Proportional Commission
Commission mirrors Customer payment receipts · paid 15th & 30th each month
1
Customer pays deposit (e.g. 30%) → you receive 30% of total Commission on next 15th or 30th.
2
Customer pays balance → remaining Commission paid on next 15th or 30th after balance received by TripFactory.
3
Full upfront payment = full Commission in one payment on the next scheduled date.
Worked Example
Package ₹1,00,000 · Commission ₹18,000
30% deposit received 5 March₹5,400 → paid 15 March
Balance received 10 April₹12,600 → paid 15 April
Best suited to

EPPs collecting staged Customer payments who want Commission to mirror actual cashflow received.

Credit Facility

2× to 4× Your Security Deposit

Lodge a Security Deposit with ORN Vacations and access a Credit Limit starting from 2× up to 4× that amount. Confirm bookings as soon as the Customer’s deposit arrives — without waiting for their full balance payment.

₹X
Security Deposit
×
2×–4×
Multiplier
=
₹4X
Credit Limit
Examples
Multiplier Options — Starting from 2×
2× Multiplier
Deposit ₹50,000
→
₹1,00,000 limit
Also: ₹1L → ₹2L  |  ₹2.5L → ₹5L
3× Multiplier
Deposit ₹50,000
→
₹1,50,000 limit
Also: ₹1L → ₹3L  |  ₹2.5L → ₹7.5L
4× Multiplier ★ Best Value
Deposit ₹50,000
→
₹2,00,000 limit
Also: ₹1L → ₹4L  |  ₹2.5L → ₹10L
⚠ The Credit Facility is not a loan. You remain solely responsible for collecting and remitting all Customer balances to ORN Vacations by the due date.
EPP Policy Pack v1.0 — All 11 Policies
How to use

Click any policy to expand its full content. All 11 policies are incorporated by reference into the EPP Agreement v1.0. TripFactory may update any policy with 30 days’ written notice.

EPP Agreement — Gaps & New Agreement
❌
Gaps & Issues Identified
Items missing or needing amendment in the current draft
1. No Minimum Initial Period HIGH
EPP can currently exit on 90 days’ notice from Day 1. No protection for ORN Vacations’ onboarding investment. Fix: Add 12-month minimum lock-in.
2. Non-Solicitation Too Short HIGH
Currently only 12 months post-termination. Insufficient to protect ORN Vacations’ customer relationships. Fix: Extend to 24 months.
3. No Cross-Default Clause MEDIUM
Breach of any other ORN Vacations agreement by EPP does not currently constitute a breach of this Agreement. Fix: Add cross-default clause (Clause 25.10).
4. No Mutual Warranties MEDIUM
No dedicated warranties clause. Both parties should warrant legal capacity, licences held, no conflicting obligations, and no undisclosed insolvency proceedings. Fix: Add Clause 8.
5. LOI / Prior Agreement Not Preserved MEDIUM
Entire agreement clause currently supersedes all prior communications. Any signed LOI is wiped out. Fix: Add carve-out in Clause 25.1 for LOIs expressly stated to survive.
6. PIN Code Attribution Unclear LOW
Territory/PIN code attribution model not addressed. Could lead to future commission disputes. Fix: Clarify or retire in Schedule A.
7. Stamp Duty Not State-Specific LOW
Clause 25.7 says “adequate value” — correct but vague. Under-stamping renders agreement inadmissible in court. Fix: Create internal state-by-state Stamp Duty reference table.
📜
EPP Agreement v1.0 — Incorporating All Amendments
ORN Vacations PTE • Exceptional Partner • 2026
Key Clauses
Clause 3 — Term ✓ Amended
3-year initial term. Minimum 12-month lock-in period — no voluntary exit in first 12 months except for ORN Vacations’ material breach. 90-day written notice required thereafter. Termination Fee applies on early exit.
Clause 6 — Commission Structure ✓ New Model
Revenue split based on verified Sales Base established at on-boarding. Opening split 80/20 (ORN/EPP). Improves to 75/25 at 1× growth and 70/30 at 2× and above. Full records access for monitoring.
Clause 8 — Mutual Warranties ✓ Added
Both parties warrant: legal capacity to enter agreement, all required licences held, no conflicting obligations, no undisclosed litigation, no current or pending insolvency proceedings.
Clause 10 — Territory & Area ✓ Added
Defined territory and radius set at on-boarding (Schedule A). EPP holds market share priority in area. No sub-agents without prior written approval. Annual performance review. Area rights conditional on active trading.
Clause 14 — System Access ✓ Added
Login credentials issued exclusively to named EPP. Must not be shared under any circumstances. EPP works exclusively for ORN Vacations PTE. All data protected and not shared outside company without ORN written approval.
Clause 19 — Post-Termination ✓ Amended
Non-compete: 12 months. Non-solicitation: extended to 24 months (staff and other EPP Partners). Brand removal within 7 days. All customer data deleted and confirmed in writing.
Clause 23 — Dispute Resolution ✓ Already Correct
Single arbitrator mutually agreed by both parties. Bangalore seat. Indian Arbitration & Conciliation Act 1996. No company-appointed arbitrator — fairer than Hoshiarpur model.
Clause 25 — General ✓ Amended
Entire agreement clause amended to preserve signed LOI where expressly stated to survive. Cross-default added (25.10): breach of any other ORN Vacations agreement constitutes breach of this Agreement.
✓ DPDPA 2023 • GST Compliance • Mandatory Trip-Ed Training
Full data protection policy incorporated by reference. GST obligations addressed in Schedule B. Mandatory induction before first booking confirmed.
⚠ This summary does not constitute legal advice. Have the full agreement reviewed by qualified counsel before signing.
ORN Vacations PTE
Exceptional Partner Agreement
Version 1.0 • 2026 • Incorporating All Amendments
⚠ Privileged & Confidential. This agreement is for internal review and discussion purposes. It does not constitute a legally binding document until signed by both parties. Obtain qualified legal advice before execution.
PARTIES

ORN Vacations PTE Ltd ("ORN Vacations", "the Company") — a company incorporated under the laws of Singapore, operating the TripFactory travel platform.

[EPP Partner Name] ("the EPP", "Exceptional Partner") — an independent travel agent or agency operating within the defined Territory.

CLAUSE 1 — DEFINITIONS

"Agreement" means this Exceptional Partner Agreement including all Schedules.

"Sales Base" means the EPP's verified current annual sales figure established during the on-boarding due diligence process and documented in Schedule A.

"Territory" means the defined geographic area and radius assigned to the EPP at on-boarding, as set out in Schedule A.

"Commission" means the EPP's share of Gross Profit on confirmed bookings as determined by the Revenue Split in Clause 6.

"Credit Facility" means the booking credit extended to the EPP as set out in Clause 13, subject to lodgement of a Security Deposit.

CLAUSE 2 — APPOINTMENT

ORN Vacations appoints the EPP as a non-exclusive Exceptional Partner to promote and sell ORN Vacations products within the Territory. This appointment is personal to the EPP and may not be transferred or sub-licensed without ORN Vacations' prior written consent.

ORN Vacations retains the right to appoint other EPP Partners in the same Territory and to sell directly. No exclusivity is granted unless expressly confirmed in writing by ORN Vacations.

CLAUSE 3 — TERM Amended

3.1 Initial Term: This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and continues for 3 years ("Initial Term"), subject to automatic renewal unless terminated in accordance with Clause 17.

3.2 Minimum Period: The EPP may not voluntarily terminate this Agreement during the first 12 months of the Initial Term ("Minimum Period") except where ORN Vacations has committed a material breach which it has failed to remedy within 30 days of written notice.

3.3 Exit Notice: After the Minimum Period, either party may terminate this Agreement by giving 90 days' written notice. A Termination Fee equal to the remaining monthly platform fees for the unexpired Initial Term is payable by the EPP on voluntary early exit.

3.4 Renewal: On expiry of the Initial Term, this Agreement renews automatically for successive 12-month periods unless either party gives 90 days' written notice of non-renewal.

CLAUSE 6 — COMMISSION STRUCTURE New Model

6.1 Sales Base: As part of on-boarding due diligence, ORN Vacations will establish the EPP's current verified annual sales figure. This figure, documented in Schedule A, constitutes the "Sales Base" and is the starting point for the revenue split.

6.2 Revenue Split:

Sales PerformanceORN VacationsEPP
At Sales Base80%20%
1× increase on Sales Base75%25%
2× and above on Sales Base70%30%

6.3 Monitoring: ORN Vacations shall have full access to all company records of the EPP, including financial statements, sales records, customer data, and marketing materials throughout the term, to monitor sales performance and determine applicable commission splits.

6.4 Payment: Commission is paid twice monthly on the 15th and last day of each month, by bank transfer, net of applicable TDS under Section 194H of the Income Tax Act 1961.

CLAUSE 8 — MUTUAL WARRANTIES Added

Each party warrants to the other that, as at the Effective Date and throughout the term: (a) it has full legal capacity and authority to enter into this Agreement; (b) all required licences, registrations, and permits are held and maintained; (c) entry into this Agreement does not conflict with any other obligation; (d) there is no pending or threatened litigation that would materially affect its ability to perform; and (e) it is not subject to any insolvency, bankruptcy, or administration proceedings.

CLAUSE 10 — TERRITORY & AREA RIGHTS Added

10.1 The EPP is appointed to the Territory set out in Schedule A. ORN Vacations commits to giving the EPP first opportunity to service leads and customers within the Territory before appointing additional partners in that area.

10.2 Territory rights are conditional on the EPP maintaining active operations and meeting agreed performance thresholds. ORN Vacations reserves the right to appoint additional partners or sell directly where demand within the Territory cannot be serviced by the existing EPP.

10.3 Sub-Agents: The EPP may not appoint sub-agents or representatives within or beyond the Territory without prior written approval from ORN Vacations PTE.

10.4 Annual Review: Territory boundaries will be reviewed annually. Areas may be extended based on strong performance or contracted where minimum thresholds are not met, with 30 days' written notice.

CLAUSE 14 — SYSTEM ACCESS & EXCLUSIVITY Added

14.1 Exclusive Use: Login credentials and system access details issued to the EPP are for the exclusive use of the named EPP only. Credentials must not be shared with any third party including staff, associates, or sub-agents. Unauthorised sharing constitutes a material breach entitling ORN Vacations to terminate immediately.

14.2 Exclusivity: The EPP works exclusively for ORN Vacations PTE in the capacity of Exceptional Partner and may not represent, promote, or act as agent for any competing travel business, tour operator, or holiday provider during the term without prior written consent.

14.3 Data Protection: All data collected or handled by the EPP in connection with ORN Vacations — including customer data, pricing, booking records, and proprietary business data — must be fully protected and not shared outside the company without prior written approval from ORN Vacations PTE.

CLAUSE 19 — POST-TERMINATION OBLIGATIONS Amended

19.1 Non-Compete: For 12 months following termination, the EPP shall not approach ORN Vacations customers with competing travel products.

19.2 Non-Solicitation: For 24 months following termination, the EPP shall not solicit, recruit, or employ any ORN Vacations staff or other EPP Partners.

19.3 Brand Removal: Within 7 days of termination, the EPP must remove all ORN Vacations branding from all digital and physical channels and confirm removal in writing.

19.4 Data Deletion: All ORN Vacations customer data must be deleted and deletion confirmed in writing within 7 days of termination.

CLAUSE 25 — GENERAL Amended

25.1 Entire Agreement: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties, superseding all prior communications, negotiations, and representations, except where a signed Letter of Intent expressly states it survives and is incorporated by reference herein.

25.3 Governing Law: This Agreement is governed by the laws of India, including the Indian Contract Act 1872, DPDPA 2023, and Consumer Protection Act 2019.

25.4 Arbitration: Any dispute shall be referred to a single arbitrator mutually agreed by both parties, seated in Bangalore, under the Indian Arbitration & Conciliation Act 1996.

25.10 Cross-Default: A material breach by the EPP of any other agreement with ORN Vacations shall constitute a material breach of this Agreement.

SCHEDULES
Schedule A
EPP Profile, Sales Base, Territory & Radius, Commission Model, Credit Facility Election
Schedule B
GST & Tax Obligations, TDS reference rates, SAC codes
Schedule C
Minimum Sales Targets by period and review dates
Schedule D
EPP Policy Pack v1.0 — all 11 policies incorporated by reference
Schedule E
Stamp Duty — state-by-state reference table (to be inserted before execution)
SIGNATURES
For and on behalf of ORN Vacations PTE
